title: BN10 8LW, Southern Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/KB3435RB/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Southern Water Services Limited Installation name: Peacehaven Sludge Treatment Centre Permit number: EPR/KB3435RB/V003  "
